data.description:
# Debt cleanup: dead code, retired flags, dead params, kind mismatch, alias horizons

## What
- Delete 7 verified-dead functions (`_current_branch`, `_find_by_id`, `build_parser`, `is_control_step`, `is_ported`, `packaged_prompt_text`, `_criterion_for`) + update their prose references.
- Retire `REBAR_WRITE_CORE`/`REBAR_COMPUTE` tier tags in 8 module docstrings + the live-looking `bash-migration.md:123` row + the no-op test env.
- Remove the dead `verdict_hash` parameter threaded through transition.py/txn.py (keep only the CLI-boundary deprecation warning).
- Align the `schema_drift` vs `schema_drift_signal` kind mismatch (`reconcile.py` filter vs `apply_inbound.py` emitter) — the tracked meta-bug.
- Record removal horizons for the 7+ deprecation alias windows.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Dead functions deleted; no dangling references; suite green.
- [ ] Retired-flag docstrings/doc/test cleaned; `verdict_hash` param removed; deprecation still warns at the CLI boundary.
- [ ] schema_drift kind mismatch resolved with a fixture/test.
- [ ] `make lint` + full suite green; commit(s) carry `rebar-ticket:` trailers.
data.title: Debt cleanup: dead code, retired flags, dead params, kind mismatch, alias horizons
